previews.customizationDesc: Tailor VAGA to your exact workflow—custom fields, document templates, and module configuration.
previews.multiCompanyDesc: Switch seamlessly between multiple companies under one VAGA instance. Consolidate reporting across entities.
previews.clientsDesc: Access your complete customer database, track interactions, and manage sales opportunities from a single dashboard.
previews.documentsDesc: Create, validate, and archive invoices, delivery notes, and purchase orders with a full, audit trail.
previews.inventoryDesc: Track stock levels in real-time, manage warehouses, and set automatic reorder alerts.

infrastructure.cloudDescription: Your ERP hosted on our secure servers. Access VAGA from any browser, anywhere in the world — without worrying about updates, backups or server maintenance.
infrastructure.cloudFeature4: Ideal for multi-site and mobile teams
infrastructure.boxTagline: Your on-premise ERP. Runs even if the DSL goes down.
infrastructure.boxDescription: A discreet mini-PC installed on your premises. Your ERP runs locally — DSL cut, Ooredoo or Topnet outage — nothing stops your production. Ideal for warehouses and areas with unstable connectivity.
infrastructure.boxFeature2: Data stored on your own premises
infrastructure.calloutText: DSL outages remain frequent in Sousse, Sfax, and industrial areas. With Vaga Box, your team keeps working — delivery notes, inventory, invoicing — without interruption.

carbon.feature1: Automatic CO₂e calculation per ISO 14064 standards
carbon.feature2: Certified PDF report generated in one click
carbon.feature3: Export-Ready for the EU & international markets

faqItems.q: Can I easily migrate my existing business data from Excel?
faqItems.a: Absolutely. VAGA allows you to easily import your product catalogs, client databases, and supplier lists directly via Excel or CSV files. Our team handles data mapping and migration so you can transition smoothly with zero downtime or loss of history.

faqItems.q: Is VAGA compliant with Tunisian accounting and tax regulations?
faqItems.a: Yes, completely. VAGA is fully aligned with current Tunisian accounting and tax standards. The platform is continuously updated to reflect changes in local fiscal legislation, ensuring your billing, invoicing, and declarations remain perfectly compliant.

faqItems.q: What kind of local technical support do you provide?
faqItems.a: We provide dedicated, high-availability local support via phone and email. Every onboarding package includes an initial training session tailored to your workflows to ensure your team achieves immediate adoption and operational proficiency.

faqItems.q: Where is my data hosted, and how secure is it?
faqItems.a: We prioritize strict data sovereignty and security. Your business data is isolated and stored on highly secure cloud servers featuring automatic daily backups and strict Row Level Security (RLS). You retain absolute, exclusive ownership of your data.

faqItems.q: What does your 'no hidden subscription fees' model mean?
faqItems.a: Our business model is entirely transparent. Unlike complex legacy systems or rigid enterprise software platforms that trap you with mandatory, ever-increasing monthly seat licenses, you only pay for the exact infrastructure modules you deploy.

faqItems.q: Is the ERP software scalable as my business grows?
faqItems.a: Yes. VAGA is built on a highly modular architecture. You can easily launch with essential inventory management and sales tools, then seamlessly unlock integrated accounting or HR workflows as your operations scale. You only ever pay for what you actually use.
